revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:4 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:4月7日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 4월 7일]][[zh-min-nan:4 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:四月初七]][[zh:四月初七]]

{{Not to be confused with|April 7|qq=April 7}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->

{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}}
{{Expand Chinese|1=四月初七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}}
{{Expand Korean|1=음력 4월 7일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}}
{{Lunisolar April|qq=}}
'''April 7''' is the 7th day of the month {{ill|April (Lunisolar)|ja|4月 (旧暦)|lt=April (Uzuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/April (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 4th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10886789}}.
== Events ==
* {{ill|Kannin|en|Kannin|qid=Q1193951|lt=Kannin|1=Kannin}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1019|en|1019|qid=Q19252|lt=1019|1=1019}} {{ill|May 14|en|May 14|qid=Q2561|lt=May 14|1=May 14}}) – {{ill|Toi invasion|en|Toi invasion|qid=Q703655|lt=Tōi Invasion|1=Toi invasion}}. The Tōi people ({{ill|Jurchen people|en|Jurchen people|qid=Q753880|lt=Jurchen|1=Jurchen people}}族) attacked {{ill|Tsushima Island|en|Tsushima Island|qid=Q52051|lt=Tsushima|1=Tsushima Island}} and {{ill|Iki|ja|壱岐|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 壱岐島|1=Iki Island|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q494914}}, killing Fujiwara no Satonaka and plundering many islanders.{{Citation needed|date=2021-03|qq=}}
* {{ill|Kanji (era)|en|Kanji (era)|qid=Q1193874|lt=Kanchi|1=Kanji (era)}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1087|en|1087|qid=Q19461|lt=1087|1=1087}} {{ill|May 11|en|May 11|qid=Q2558|lt=May 11|1=May 11}}) – For the accession of {{ill|Emperor Horikawa|en|Emperor Horikawa|qid=Q464267|lt=Horikawa Emperor|1=Emperor Horikawa}}, the era name was changed from {{ill|Ōtoku|ja|Ōtoku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtoku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} to {{ill|Kanji (era)|en|Kanji (era)|qid=Q1193874|lt=Kanchi|1=Kanji (era)}} via {{ill|Era change|ja|改元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Era change|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11498853}}.
* {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|qid=Q776775|lt=Keiō|1=Keiō}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1865|en|1865|qid=Q7708|lt=1865|1=1865}} {{ill|May 1|en|May 1|qid=Q2544|lt=May 1|1=May 1}}) – The era name was changed from {{ill|Genji era|en|Genji era|qid=Q1325419|lt=Genji|1=Genji era}} to {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|qid=Q776775|lt=Keiō|1=Keiō}}.
* {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|qid=Q776775|lt=Keiō|1=Keiō}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1865|en|1865|qid=Q7708|lt=1865|1=1865}} {{ill|May 21|en|May 21|qid=Q2580|lt=May 21|1=May 21}}) – A decree entitled “Notice on the Certification of Permission for Overseas Travel” was issued, lifting the ban on overseas travel for commercial and study purposes.
* {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1871|en|1871|qid=Q7746|lt=1871|1=1871}} {{ill|May 25|en|May 25|qid=Q2585|lt=May 25|1=May 25}}) – The “Exclusive Patent Regulations on New Inventions” were promulgated.
== Births ==
* {{ill|Chōshō|en|Chōshō|qid=Q1194264|lt=Chōshō|1=Chōshō}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1133|en|1133|qid=Q19586|lt=1133|1=1133}} {{ill|May 13|en|May 13|qid=Q2560|lt=May 13|1=May 13}}) – {{ill|Hōnen|en|Hōnen|qid=Q507980|lt=Hōnen|1=Hōnen}}, founder of {{ill|Jōdo-shū|en|Jōdo-shū|qid=Q912208|lt=Jōdo-shū|1=Jōdo-shū}} (died {{ill|1212|en|1212|qid=Q5255|lt=1212|1=1212}}).
* {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|qid=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} 7th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1579|en|1579|qid=Q6709|lt=1579|1=1579}} {{ill|May 2|en|May 2|qid=Q2545|lt=May 2|1=May 2}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Hidetada|en|Tokugawa Hidetada|qid=Q314464|lt=Tokugawa Hidetada|1=Tokugawa Hidetada}}, 2nd generation {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|ja|徳川幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 江戸幕府}} {{ill|Shogun|en|Shogun|qid=Q131767|lt=Shōgun|1=Shogun}} (died {{ill|1632|en|1632|qid=Q6865|lt=1632|1=1632}}).
* {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|qid=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1831|en|1831|qid=Q7579|lt=1831|1=1831}} {{ill|May 18|en|May 18|qid=Q2576|lt=May 18|1=May 18}}) – {{ill|Kawanabe Kyōsai|en|Kawanabe Kyōsai|qid=Q2838030|lt=Kawanabe Kyōsai|1=Kawanabe Kyōsai}}, an {{ill|Ukiyo-e artist|ja|浮世絵師|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ukiyo-e artist|1=ukiyo-e artist|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q33082999}} (died {{ill|1889|en|1889|qid=Q7831|lt=1889|1=1889}}).
* {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|qid=Q776775|lt=Keiō|1=Keiō}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1867|en|1867|qid=Q7715|lt=1867|1=1867}} {{ill|May 10|en|May 10|qid=Q2557|lt=May 10|1=May 10}}) – {{ill|Takarabe Takeshi|en|Takarabe Takeshi|qid=Q7476202|lt=Zaibei Hyō|1=Takarabe Takeshi}}, a {{ill|Military personnel|en|Military personnel|qid=Q47064|lt=military personnel|1=Military personnel}} and {{ill|Politician|en|Politician|qid=Q82955|lt=politician|1=Politician}} (died {{ill|1949|en|1949|qid=Q5188|lt=1949|1=1949}}).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|en|Emperor Tenmu|qid=Q335181|lt=Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu}} 7th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|678|en|678|qid=Q23448|lt=678|1=678}} {{ill|May 3|en|May 3|qid=Q2547|lt=May 3|1=May 3}}) – {{ill|Princess Tōchi|en|Princess Tōchi|qid=Q836214|lt=Imperial Princess Juichi|1=Princess Tōchi}}, a member of the imperial family.
* {{ill|Hōki|en|Hōki|qid=Q18520676|lt=Hōki|1=Hōki}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|772|en|772|qid=Q30729|lt=772|1=772}} {{ill|May 13|en|May 13|qid=Q2560|lt=May 13|1=May 13}}) – {{ill|Dōkyō|en|Dōkyō|qid=Q1272718|lt=Dōkyō|1=Dōkyō}}, a monk.
* {{ill|Chōkyō|en|Chōkyō|qid=Q968843|lt=Chōkyō|1=Chōkyō}} 2nd year – {{ill|Satomi Yoshimi|ja|里見義実|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Satomi Yoshimi|1=Satomi Yoshizane|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11644665}} of the {{ill|Sengoku Daimyo|ja|戦国大名|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sengoku Daimyo|1=Sengoku daimyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q5384684}}, founder of the {{ill|Satomi clan|en|Satomi clan|qid=Q2975367|lt=Satomi clan|1=Satomi clan}} (born {{ill|1416|en|1416|qid=Q6189|lt=1416|1=1416}}; though his historical existence is debated).
* {{ill|Daiei (era)|en|Daiei (era)|qid=Q1193564|lt=Daiei|1=Daiei (era)}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1523|en|1523|qid=Q6302|lt=1523|1=1523}} {{ill|May 21|en|May 21|qid=Q2580|lt=May 21|1=May 21}}) – {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshizai|ja|足利義材|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashikaga Yoshizai|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 足利義稙|1=Ashikaga Yoshitane|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q708527}}, 10th generation {{ill|Ashikaga Shogunate|1=Ashikaga shogunate|2=ja|3=室町幕府|ja|足利幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashikaga Shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 室町幕府|1=Ashikaga shogunate|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1154406}} {{ill|Shogun|en|Shogun|qid=Q131767|lt=Shōgun|1=Shogun}} (born {{ill|1466|en|1466|qid=Q6559|lt=1466|1=1466}}).
* {{ill|Daiei (era)|en|Daiei (era)|qid=Q1193564|lt=Daiei|1=Daiei (era)}} 6th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1526|en|1526|qid=Q6325|lt=1526|1=1526}} {{ill|May 18|en|May 18|qid=Q2576|lt=May 18|1=May 18}}) – {{ill|Emperor Go-Kashiwabara|en|Emperor Go-Kashiwabara|qid=Q349452|lt=Emperor Gohakuhara|1=Emperor Go-Kashiwabara}}, the 104th {{ill|Emperor of Japan|en|Emperor of Japan|qid=Q208233|lt=Emperor of Japan|1=Emperor of Japan}} (born {{ill|1464|en|1464|qid=Q6552|lt=1464|1=1464}}).
* {{ill|Genroku|en|Genroku|qid=Q1325001|lt=Genroku|1=Genroku}} 16th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1703|en|1703|qid=Q6822|lt=1703|1=1703}} {{ill|May 22|en|May 22|qid=Q2581|lt=May 22|1=May 22}}) – In Osaka, a woman from the new settlement at {{ill|Dōjima|ja|堂島|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dōjima|1=Dōjima|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11427870}} and a retainer of the soy sauce merchant Heiyanoya of Uchimotochō, Dekibey, committed {{ill|Shinjū|en|Shinjū|qid=Q753811|lt=mass suicide|1=Shinjū}}.
* {{ill|Kyōhō|en|Kyōhō|qid=Q1145048|lt=Kyōhō|1=Kyōhō}} 15th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1730|en|1730|qid=Q6957|lt=1730|1=1730}} {{ill|May 23|en|May 23|qid=Q2583|lt=May 23|1=May 23}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Munetaka|en|Tokugawa Munetaka|qid=Q6998366|lt=Tokugawa Sōyō|1=Tokugawa Munetaka}}, 4th lord of the {{ill|Mito Domain|en|Mito Domain|qid=Q1146904|lt=Mito Domain|1=Mito Domain}} (born {{ill|1705|en|1705|qid=Q6830|lt=1705|1=1705}}).

== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|4|6|4|8|3|7|5|4|0407|qq=}} 
* {{ill|Japanese calendar|ja|和暦|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese calendar|qq=}}

# {{ill|Goki calendar|en|Goki calendar|qid=Q2511446|lt=Goki Calendar|1=Goki calendar}}
# {{ill|Xuanming calendar|en|Xuanming calendar|qid=Q2511456|lt=Senmei Calendar|1=Xuanming calendar}}
# {{ill|Jōkyō calendar|en|Jōkyō calendar|qid=Q2353004|lt=Jōkyō Calendar|1=Jōkyō calendar}}
# {{ill|Hōryaku calendar|en|Hōryaku calendar|qid=Q2352988|lt=Hōreki Calendar|1=Hōryaku calendar}}
# {{ill|Kansei calendar|en|Kansei calendar|qid=Q2355562|lt=Kansei Calendar|1=Kansei calendar}}
# {{ill|Tenpō calendar|en|Tenpō calendar|qid=Q1066717|lt=Tenpō Calendar|1=Tenpō calendar}}
